title: December 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 27''' is the 361st day of the year (362nd in leap years). There are 4 days remaining in the year.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Tovah Feldshuh]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 47|''Star Wars Weekly'' 47]] published.
*[[1980]] – [[Elizabeth Rodriguez]] is born.
*[[1987]] – [[Lily Cole]] is born.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 25|''Star Wars'' (1998) 25]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 1|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 1]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 11|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 11]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Grant McCune]] dies.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' published in new paperback form. A short story by [[James Luceno]] is featured inside.
*2011 – [[Red Harvest (novel)|''Red Harvest'']] paperback released.
*[[2016]] – [[Carrie Fisher]] dies.
*2016 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Official Stormtrooper Training Manual]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 5|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 5]] published.
*2017 – [[Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu 5|''Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu'' 5]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars: The Last Jedi – The Storms of Crait 1|''Star Wars: The Last Jedi – The Storms of Crait'' 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Chapter 8: Redemption]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 5 — The Spark Eternal]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Dark Droids 5|''Dark Droids'' 5]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 7|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' 7]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Olivia Hussey]] dies.
<noinclude>
